violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Name provided was attached to another establishment. Change of food safety manager license and CFSM license application provided. At least one person needs to be linked to establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Meatballs, which was previously cooked and cooled, was only reheated to 97 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Per PIC meatballs were recently placed in hot hold unit. Meatballs were moved back to stove top to fully be reheated. Food to be temped before placed in hot hold unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
Sliced deli meat was observed held past a day or date that exceeds 7 days. Deli meat was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. The sanitizer that was being used for the deli slicer was in excess of 200 ppm. Bottle diluted and guidance document provided. Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Sanitizer solution from the 3-bay dispenser must be diluted and tested to ensure it falls within manufacturers recommended ppm. Proper sanitizing procedures discussed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Cookies and brownies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap (has air break). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
The 3-bay sink was lacking stoppers. Stoppers to be purchased. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
